translation: def decode(data: typing.List[int], out: typing.Union[io.BytesIO, io.StringIO, io.BufferedWriter]) -> int:
if b1 == Base64Decoder.__PAD_BYTE or b2 == Base64Decoder.__PAD_BYTE:
"Invalid Base64 input: incorrect padding, first two bytes cannot be padding"
out.write(bytes([(b1 << 2) | (b2 >> 4)]))  # 6 bits of b1 plus 2 bits of b2
out.write(bytes([((b2 << 4) | (b3 >> 2)) & Base64Decoder.__MASK_BYTE_UNSIGNED]))  # 4 bits of b2 plus 4 bits of b3
out.write(bytes([((b3 << 6) | b4) & Base64Decoder.__MASK_BYTE_UNSIGNED]))  # 2 bits of b3 plus 6 bits of b4
elif b4 != Base64Decoder.__PAD_BYTE:  # if byte 3 is pad, byte 4 must be pad too
"Invalid Base64 input: incorrect padding, 4th byte must be padding if 3rd byte is"
